title: identity — published events
description: Every credential-lifecycle event fires after DB commit so downstream listeners never see uncommitted state. Payloads are readonly value objects (readonly class + readonly properties) — immutable by construction so a listener cannot mutate the shape another listener depends on. Payloads carry `identity_id` only; downstream services that need email / dob / MFA state re-fetch through IdentityRepository so redaction rules apply consistently.

events.name: IdentityRegistered
events.trigger: New Identity row inserted after passing compliance-floor + email-uniqueness checks. Fires exactly once per Identity, ever.

payload.email_fingerprint: string (SHA-256 of normalised email — never the plaintext)
payload.is_minor: boolean (resolved by CompliantAgePolicy at creation time)

events.name: IdentityEmailVerificationRequested
events.trigger: New EmailVerificationToken issued (registration OR email-change flow). Debounced 60s per identity_id.

events.name: IdentityEmailVerified
events.trigger: Identity.email_verified_at flipped from NULL to now(). Idempotent — re-verifying a verified identity is a no-op.

events.name: PasswordChanged
events.trigger: Identity.password_hash mutated (via voluntary change OR forced reset). Password added to password_history_hashed rolling window in the same transaction.

payload.actor_id: ULID | null (null = self-service; non-null for admin/system actions)

events.name: PasswordResetRequested
events.trigger: POST /api/v1/auth/password/forgot passed rate-limit + resolved a real Identity. NEVER fired when the email is unknown (email-enumeration safety — the endpoint still returns 200 so the caller can't distinguish).

events.name: PasswordResetCompleted
events.trigger: PasswordResetToken exchanged for a new password. Token consumed atomically.

events.name: IdentityLocked
events.trigger: failed_attempts_count reached `identity.lockout.max_failed_attempts` (default 5). locked_until set to now() + `lockout_minutes` (progressive backoff when consecutive lockouts occur within one hour).

payload.lockout_number: integer (1st, 2nd, 3rd … lockout in the current hour — drives progressive backoff)

events.name: IdentityUnlocked
events.trigger: AutoUnlockExpiredLockoutsJob cleared an expired lockout OR platform-admin invoked `identity:unlock`. failed_attempts_count reset to 0 in the same transaction.

events.name: MfaEnrolled
events.trigger: Identity.mfa_secret_encrypted transitioned from NULL to a KMS-encrypted value AND the enrolment was confirmed by a valid TOTP challenge. Recovery codes generated + hashed in the same transaction.

events.name: MfaDisabled
events.trigger: Identity.mfa_secret_encrypted transitioned to NULL. Recovery codes purged in the same transaction. Requires re-authentication + explicit consent — never fires as a side-effect.

events.name: RecoveryCodesRegenerated
events.trigger: Identity holder invoked the regenerate-recovery-codes flow. Old codes purged, new codes hashed + persisted, plaintext shown once in the response.

events.name: IdentityErased
events.trigger: Identity soft-deleted (GDPR erasure request received) OR hard-deleted (hold-period expired). Two dispatches per full erasure lifecycle.

payload.reason: string (free-form justification captured at request time)
